summary: Walmart FY2026 revenue $713.16B (+4.73% YoY), earnings $21.89B (+12.64%). AI focus highlighted in annual report. New $350M milk processing plant in Texas. Dividend of $0.248/share ex-date May 8, 2026. Plans to remodel 650+ stores and open ~20 new locations. Stock trading ~$132 on April 30.
